title: lasianthus oblongus
intro: Lasianthus oblongus is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lasianthus oblongus include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Lasianthus oblongus may include teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
